title: OrganiGram (OGI) Q4 2021 Earnings Preview
text: OrganiGram (OGI) Q4 2021 Earnings Preview. Publication Date: November 16, 2021. Source: Zacks Equity Research via Yahoo Finance. OrganiGram is anticipated to report a quarterly loss per share of $0.04, representing a 33.3% year-over-year decline in earnings. The cannabis producer is expected to show revenue growth of 24%, reaching $18.83 million compared to the prior-year period. Analyst Outlook: The consensus estimate has remained stable over the preceding 30 days, indicating analyst views have not shifted materially. The company carries a Zacks Rank of #3, representing a neutral outlook. Earnings Surprise Prediction: The Earnings ESP (Expected Surprise Prediction) stands at 0%, as the Most Accurate Estimate aligns with the consensus forecast. This metric suggests difficulty in conclusively predicting that OrganiGram will beat the consensus EPS estimate. Historical Performance: OrganiGram has demonstrated inconsistency in meeting analyst expectations, failing to exceed consensus projections in any of the previous four quarters. The most recent quarter showed the company matching expectations precisely, delivering a $0.03 loss per share. Report Release: The Q4 results were scheduled for release on November 23, 2021.
